title: panicum paianum
intro: Panicum paianum, also known as Panic grass, is a type of plant native to tropical Africa, which belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Panicum paianum include treating fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Panicum paianum include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
